title: Process Analyst
salary: {'min': None, 'max': None, 'currency': None, 'period': None, 'additionalDetails': 'Competitive Salaries\nSocial and Medical Insurance\nWFH', 'isPaid': True}
description:
On behalf of our giant, global, client; Amazon; RiseUP group is seeking to hire the following:

 

Job Title for the new hire: Process Analyst 

 

Job Description: Operations Engineering - Process Support & Administration 

 

Job Overview 

The Business Analyst / Process Support Engineer supports and coordinates the execution of multiple operational processes across Operations Engineering projects in Amazon fulfillment centers. They manage process administration, quality assurance, reporting, and continuous improvement initiatives while ensuring compliance with Amazon's policies and best practices across Building Information Modeling (BIM) Administration, Change Request (CR) Management, Lessons Learnt (LL) Management, and Cost Discipline Management. 

 

Key Responsibilities 

Building Information Modeling (BIM) Administration: 

  • Manage BIM 360 permissions and onboard Ops Engineering Team and Material Handling Equipment (MHE) Vendors 
  • Attend and coordinate Post-Contract BIM Kick-Off meetings with all stakeholders (General Contractor (GC), Operations Design Team (ODT), MHE, Amazon Robotics (AR)) 
  • Request and review BIM Execution Plan (BEP) responses from MHE vendors in coordination with Ops Eng BIM Manager 
  • Review first MHE model submissions for compliance (2D/3D native and federated models, naming conventions, coordinates, file formats) 
  • Conduct routine reviews of BEP drafts and model submissions 
  • Perform end-of-stage reviews to ensure MHE Vendors meet requirements 
  • Collect and document lessons learned to improve Exchange Information Requirements (EIR) and BIM deliverable quality 

Change Request (CR) Management: 

  • Provide ad-hoc support to project Managers (PMs) in pre-execution and execution phases 
  • Conduct quality checks on every CR created 
  • Coordinate with Global Procurement Organization (GPO) to organize bundle CR analysis and ensure stakeholder support matches vendor due dates 
  • Organize coordination calls and ensure appropriate stakeholder attendance 
  • Support improvement initiatives for current BIM 360 processes 
  • Maintain Change Management dashboard governance 
  • Conduct weekly office hours to resolve user questions 
  • Ensure closure of CR loops by tracking repeated CRs and updating MHE vendor baseline requirements 
  • Coordinate with CR Management and Lessons Learnt workstreams to maintain clear connections with cost management 

 

Lessons Learnt (LL) Management: 

  • Monitor progress of lessons learned per team in Operations Engineering to ensure proper closure 
  • Conduct sanity checks on resolutions (verify specification updates, validate action items completion) 
  • Track due dates and team assignments for all open lessons learned 
  • Support dashboard integration and maintenance for Leadership Team visibility 
  • Provide tool expertise including setup of automation rules and workflows 
  • Manage task organization and project structure optimization 
  • Support Artificial Intelligence (AI) integration for automated raising of new lessons learned 
  • Develop and implement AI-powered extraction of relevant lessons learned from project data 
  • Respond to ad hoc requests for integrated status reports and customized lessons learned reports 

 

Cost Discipline Management: 

  • Maintain Capital Allocation Request (CAR) database, pulling data from cost cloud tool or approved CAR into excel database (actual vs approved CAR budget) 
  • Maintain Value Engineering (VE) database, intercepting VE for Leadership Team Milestones (LTMs) and CAR White Papers (WPs) 
  • Track budget expenses and support PMs for data completeness 
  • Provide CAR benchmarking support and reference site information 
  • Ensure CR loop closure by tracking repeated CRs and adding to MHE vendor baseline requirements 
  • Work closely with CR Management and Lessons Learnt workstreams to maintain clear connection with cost management 

 

Reporting and Documentation: 

  • Maintain daily/weekly progress reports in Asana and update tracking systems 
  • Participate in weekly meetings with Amazon Ops Eng team 
  • Document observations and lessons learned in appropriate systems 
  • Prepare status reports and dashboards for leadership visibility 
  • Support continuous improvement of processes and tools
requirements:
Required Skills: 

  • Process management and quality control 
  • Project coordination experience in technical/industrial environments 
  • Strong communication and stakeholder management skills 
  • Data analysis and reporting capabilities 
  • Experience with project management tools (Asana, Smartsheets, BIM 360) 
  • Technical documentation and reporting skills 
  • Problem-solving and analytical abilities 
  • Attention to detail and quality assurance mindset 
  • Experience with dashboard creation and governance 
  • Ability to manage multiple workstreams simultaneously 
  • Proficiency in Excel and database management 
  • Understanding of construction/MHE project workflows (preferred) 

 

Work Environment: 

  • Remote or hybrid work arrangement possible 
  • May require flexible hours to coordinate with global teams across EU, LATAM, and AU regions 
  • Must be available for weekly coordination meetings and office hours 
  • Workload varies depending on project phase and workstream demands 

 

Technical Assessment needed: Yes 

 

Expected deliverables: 

Building Information Modeling (BIM) Administration: 

  • BIM 360 permission setup and user onboarding documentation 
  • BIM Execution Plan (BEP) review reports 
  • MHE model submission compliance reports (2D/3D reviews) 
  • End-of-stage BIM deliverable assessments 
  • Lessons learned documentation for BIM processes 

 

Change Request (CR) Management: 

  • CR quality check reports 
  • Bundle CR analysis coordination summaries 
  • Change Management dashboard updates 
  • Weekly office hours support documentation 
  • Repeated CR tracking reports with vendor baseline requirement updates 

 

Lessons Learnt (LL) Management: 

  • Lessons learned progress tracking reports 
  • Resolution sanity check documentation 
  • Leadership dashboard updates 
  • Asana automation rules and workflow configurations 
  • AI integration implementation for lessons learned extraction 
  • Ad hoc status reports and customized lessons learned reports 

 

Cost Discipline Management: 

  • Capital Allocation Request (CAR) database (Excel format with actual vs approved budget) 
  • Value Engineering (VE) database for Leadership Team Milestones (LTMs) and White Papers (WPs) Budget expense tracking reports 
  • CAR benchmarking analysis and reference site documentation 

 

Cross-Functional Deliverables: 

  • Weekly progress reports in Asana 
  • Meeting minutes and action item tracking 
  • Process improvement recommendations 
  • Dashboard governance reports 
  • Stakeholder coordination summaries

 

Required qualifications/certifications: 

Basic 

  • Bachelor’s degree 
  • Process administration experience 
  • Stakeholder co-ordination  
  • Strong spoken and written English 
  • Exposure to BIM processes and tools 

 

Preferred  

  • Able to work with structured data and extract insights 
  • Experience in an engineering organization that deploys capital projects 

 

Software / programs / tools: Asana, BIM360 

 

Required Years of Experience: 5 

 

Travel is required for this role: No

title: IT Business Analyst Manager (AEC)
salary: {'min': None, 'max': None, 'currency': None, 'period': None, 'additionalDetails': None, 'isPaid': True}
description:
Role

 

Dewan Architects & Engineers is a global design consultancy firm with 900+ professionals across offices in the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Vietnam, the Philippines, and Iraq. We are seeking an IT Business Analyst to join our Enterprise Technology function. In this role, you will support business analysis and digital change initiatives across AEC workflows (design, engineering, project delivery, commercial, and support functions), translating business needs into clear requirements and actionable delivery plans. You will partner with stakeholders and delivery teams to implement solutions across core platforms (CDE/BIM, PMIS, ERP, collaboration, and integrations), ensuring adoption, value realization, and governance. You will report to the Head of the Enterprise Technology Department (ETD) and work closely with solution architects, vendors, and BI/Data teams to deliver integrated outcomes.

 

Responsibilities 

 

  • Lead business analysis activities for assigned initiatives; apply BA standards, templates, and quality controls for requirements and documentation.
  • Partner with business leaders (Design, PMO, Construction, Commercial, Finance, HR, Procurement) to understand priorities and shape delivery roadmaps.
  • Report to the Head of ETD and collaborate with solution architects, engineers, vendors, and business owners to deliver fit-for-purpose solutions.
  • Facilitate discovery workshops to map current-state processes and design future-state workflows across the project lifecycle (tender → design → construction → handover).
  • Elicit, analyze, and document business, functional, non-functional, and reporting requirements; maintain traceability through delivery and change control.
  • Translate requirements into epics/user stories, acceptance criteria, and test scenarios for Agile/Hybrid delivery teams and vendors.
  • Support selection, implementation, and continuous improvement of AEC platforms (e.g., CDE/DMS, BIM coordination, PMIS/field tools, ERP, and collaboration).
  • Define data needs and KPIs for project and corporate reporting; align with BI/data teams on data sources, definitions, and governance.
  • Coordinate UAT planning and execution: test scripts, defect triage, go/no-go readiness, and sign-off with key stakeholders.
  • Drive change management activities: communications, training coordination, adoption tracking, and post-go-live stabilization.
  • Work with solution architects and engineers on integration requirements (APIs, middleware, data flows) between ERP, PMIS, CDE, and identity/security controls.
  • Ensure solutions comply with IT policies, security requirements, and project information management standards (including access controls and audit evidence where needed).
  • Track benefits realization and operational KPIs; identify opportunities for automation and continuous improvement (workflow, RPA, self-service).
  • Demonstrate ethical and professional behavior and adherence to company policies and procedures.
requirements:
Qualifications

 

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Computer Science, Engineering, Construction Management, or related field (or equivalent experience).
  • 8+ years of experience in business analysis / digital delivery, with demonstrated ownership of BA workstreams in complex programs.
  • Proven experience delivering solutions in AEC environments, with strong understanding of design and construction workflows.
  • Strong requirements management skills (BRD/FRD, user stories, process mapping, acceptance criteria, traceability).
  • Working knowledge of AEC delivery systems such as CDE/document control (ACC/BIM 360, Aconex, SharePoint), PMIS/field tools (Procore, Primavera P6/MS Project), and/or ERP (Oracle/SAP/Dynamics).
  • Experience with stakeholder management, workshop facilitation, and executive-ready communication.
  • Hands-on experience supporting UAT and change adoption across multi-location teams.
  • Willingness to participate in occasional off-hours/weekend support for go-lives and major releases.

 

Bonus Points

 

  • CBAP/CCBA, PMI-PBA, PMP, PRINCE2, Agile/Scrum, or ITIL certification.
  • Experience with BIM information management concepts and CDE governance (e.g., ISO 19650-aligned practices).
  • Familiarity with integration patterns, APIs, and data modeling fundamentals; experience working with middleware/iPaaS tools.

title: Development and Pricing Analyst - Real Estate
salary: {'min': None, 'max': None, 'currency': None, 'period': None, 'additionalDetails': None, 'isPaid': True}
description:
Role Description

The Development & Pricing Analyst is responsible for analyzing real estate development opportunities, evaluating project feasibility, and supporting pricing strategies for residential, commercial, and mixed-use projects. The role involves financial modeling, market analysis, cost estimation, and collaboration with development, sales, and finance teams to optimize project profitability and competitive pricing.

 

 

Key Responsibilities

 

1. Real Estate Development Analysis

  • Evaluate potential real estate development opportunities.
  • Conduct feasibility studies and investment analysis.
  • Prepare financial models including IRR, NPV, ROI, and cash flow projections.
  • Analyze project costs, timelines, and expected revenues.

2. Pricing Strategy & Analysis

  • Develop pricing strategies for real estate units based on market trends.
  • Monitor competitor pricing and market positioning.
  • Recommend price adjustments to maximize sales and profitability.
  • Analyze sales performance and absorption rates.

3. Market Research

  • Conduct real estate market research including supply, demand, and pricing trends.
  • Track competitors' projects, unit sizes, pricing, and sales strategies.
  • Prepare market reports and development recommendations.

4. Financial Modeling & Reporting

  • Build and maintain development financial models.
  • Prepare project feasibility reports and pricing studies.
  • Generate dashboards and reports for senior management.
  • Support budgeting and forecasting processes.

5. Cross-Functional Coordination

  • Work closely with development, sales, finance, and marketing teams.
  • Provide pricing guidance during project launches.
  • Assist in land acquisition analysis and due diligence.

 

 

Preferred Qualifications

 

  • Experience with real estate developers or consulting firms is a MUST.
  • Knowledge of Power BI, or data visualization tools.
  • Experience with real estate CRM or ERP systems.
  • Professional certifications in real estate finance or investment analysis.
requirements:
• Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Real Estate, Economics, Business Administration, or Engineering.
  • 3–7 years of experience in real estate development analysis or pricing.
  • Strong experience in real estate feasibility studies and financial modeling.
  • Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel (financial models, dashboards).
  • Knowledge of real estate market analysis and pricing strategies.

Are you a visionary who thrives at the intersection of technology and business strategy? Do you possess a passion for optimizing complex operations and driving efficiency? This is an exceptional on-site opportunity for an experienced professional ready to make a significant impact!

As our ERP Demand Advisor, you will be instrumental in shaping our future by bridging the gap between business needs and powerful ERP solutions. You'll be at the forefront of optimizing our demand planning and supply chain processes, ensuring seamless operations and strategic growth. Get ready to leverage your expertise in a role that offers both challenge and immense reward!

  • Overview: Lead the strategic implementation and optimization of ERP modules related to demand planning and supply chain, ensuring alignment with business objectives and operational excellence.
  • Responsibilities:
    • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to gather business requirements and translate them into effective ERP solutions.
    • Design, configure, and implement demand planning and supply chain functionalities within our ERP system.
    • Perform in-depth data analysis to identify trends, forecast demand, and recommend strategies for inventory optimization.
    • Provide expert advice and support to end-users, ensuring maximum utilization of ERP capabilities.
    • Develop and deliver training programs to enhance user proficiency and adoption.
    • Continuously monitor system performance and suggest improvements to enhance efficiency and effectiveness.
    • Act as a key liaison between IT and business stakeholders, fostering strong communication and collaboration.
  • Skills/Technologies: This role demands a strong command of Demand Planning, Supply Chain Management, and hands-on expertise with various ERP Systems. Familiarity with specific platforms like SAP or Oracle ERP is highly valued, alongside robust Data Analysis and Forecasting capabilities.
  • Growth Opportunities: This position offers unparalleled opportunities for professional development, including exposure to cutting-edge ERP technologies, leadership in critical projects, and a clear path for career advancement within our rapidly expanding organization. You'll be encouraged to innovate, learn, and grow your expertise.
  • Team/Culture: Join a collaborative, forward-thinking team that values innovation, problem-solving, and continuous improvement. We foster an environment where your ideas are heard, and your contributions are celebrated. Our culture is built on mutual respect, high performance, and a shared commitment to excellence.

description:
Job Description

 

Senior Copywriter & Social Media Specialist

 

We’re looking for a Senior Copywriter & Social Media Specialist to take full ownership of our content presence across platforms and digital touchpoints. This role combines strategic thinking with hands-on execution, from ideation to publishing to performance analysis.

 

You will be responsible for shaping how the brand communicates, grows, and converts its audience.

 

Key Responsibilities

 

Content Strategy & Planning

 

Develop and execute monthly content strategies aligned with business and growth goals

Translate high-level ideas into structured content calendars and campaigns

Identify content opportunities across social media and website

 

 

Copywriting & Content Creation

 

Write high-quality bilingual (Arabic & English) content across formats:

 

  • Social media posts and captions
  • Carousels and short-form video scripts
  • Website content (landing pages, service pages, blog articles)
  • Case studies, proposals, and marketing materials
  • Adapt tone and messaging depending on platform, funnel stage, and audience

 

 

Website & Conversion Copy

 

  • Write and optimize website content with a focus on clarity, structure, and conversion
  • Collaborate on landing pages and key user journeys (CTAs, messaging hierarchy, value propositions)
  • Ensure consistency between website messaging and social media communication

 

 

Social Media Management

 

  • Manage and grow accounts across LinkedIn, Instagram, and TikTok/YouTube
  • Ensure content is platform-native (not duplicated blindly across channels)
  • Maintain consistency in brand voice and publishing cadence

 

 

Execution & Production

 

  • Collaborate with designers when needed, but also independently produce simple assets using tools like Canva/CapCut
  • Take content from idea → draft → publish without bottlenecks

 

 

Performance Tracking & Optimization

 

  • Monitor content and website performance using platform insights and basic analytics
  • Produce weekly reports with clear takeaways (what worked, what didn’t, what to change)
  • Continuously iterate on both social and website content based on data

 

 

Collaboration & Communication

 

  • Work closely with founders, marketing, and product teams to align messaging
  • Contribute ideas proactively, not just execute briefs

 

 

What Success Looks Like

 

  • Consistent growth in engagement, reach, and audience quality
  • Improved website clarity and conversion performance
  • Strong, recognizable, and consistent brand voice across all touchpoints
  • Ability to independently run content across social and web with minimal supervision

 

 

This role is for someone who understands that content is not just about writing,  it’s about driving results across the entire funnel.
requirements:
Requirements

 

Experience  
Minimum 3 years in copywriting, content creation, and social media management, with proven ownership of content strategy and execution.  
A portfolio is mandatory and must demonstrate measurable impact (engagement, growth, conversions).

 

Languages  
Native-level Arabic and fluent English are both required.  
You must be able to write professionally and efficiently in both languages.  
Bilingual writing quality will be tested during the hiring process.

Writing Skills  


Exceptional command of written Arabic and English across multiple tones and formats:
- Formal (case studies, proposals)
- Conversational (social captions, short-form content)
- Authoritative (thought leadership, long-form content)

Weak writing = immediate rejection, regardless of other qualifications.

 

Social Media Expertise  
Hands-on experience managing and growing accounts on:
- LinkedIn
- meta platforms
- At least one of TikTok or YouTube

You should understand platform-native behavior, content formats, and algorithm dynamics, and adapt content strategy accordingly—not just repost across channels.

 

Content Strategy  
Ability to plan and execute content calendars aligned with business goals.  
You should be comfortable turning abstract ideas into structured content pipelines.

Design Tools (Preferred)  
 

 

Analytics & Reporting  
Ability to interpret platform insights and translate data into clear, actionable weekly reports.  
You are not expected to be a data analyst, but you must be numerically literate and performance-driven.

 

Mindset  
- Detail-oriented and fast-moving  

-Professional at using AI tools
- High ownership and accountability  
- Strong judgment on what “good content” actually looks like  
- You must be able to differentiate between normal content, and content that would make a real impact

title: UI/UX Product Designer - UK SaaS (Long Term, Remote, GBP)
salary: {'min': 1300, 'max': 1400, 'currency': {'id': 23, 'name': 'British Pound', 'translations': {'name': {'ar': 'جنيه إسترليني', 'en': 'British Pound'}}, 'code': 'GBP'}, 'period': {'id': 4, 'name': 'Per Month', 'translations': {'period': {'ar': 'في الشهر', 'en': 'Per Month'}}}, 'additionalDetails': 'Health insurance contribution (starts in January)\n21 days paid annual holiday plus Egyptian public holidays\nCompany laptop after 3 months (use your own to start)', 'isPaid': True}
description:
Zealous is a UK-based submissions management platform used by 500+ arts organisations and 180,000+ creators worldwide. Our clients include the Saatchi Gallery, the British Library, and Cass Arts. We handle the end-to-end process for awards, open calls, grants, residencies, and art fairs - all in one place. We've been building for 15 years and we're a team of fourteen.

 

This is not a short-term project - if successful you will be a core member of our team.

 

We're hiring our first dedicated Product Designer. Until now, design at Zealous has meant UI execution - implementing specs, building components, keeping things consistent. What we haven't had is someone who takes a brief, shapes the flow, prototypes how it should work, and partners with engineering to ship it well. That's this role.

 

You'll work directly with our UK-based Founder and PM, who continue shaping product direction and writing briefs. You'll turn those briefs into the designs we build, and work closely with our frontend lead on handoff. Over time - as you build context - we'd like you to grow into user research, building out our design system, and shaping product thinking earlier. You'll be the only designer in the room - your decisions ship directly, without hundreds of layers of review. That's a growth path, not a day-one expectation.

 

How we work

Fully remote, Sunday–Thursday. Core hours are 9–5 Egypt time but we're genuinely flexible - several of us work around young kids, and we care about the work getting done well, not clock-watching.

 

Day to day responsibilities

  • Take briefs from the PM and Founder and turn them into well-structured user flows, wireframes, and interactive Figma prototypes
  • Work closely with our frontend lead on handoff - communicate design intent clearly, answer questions during build, and review what ships against what was designed
  • Keep our Figma workspace organised and maintainable as it grows - consistent components, sensible naming, files others can find their way around
  • Sit in design review alongside our frontend lead, flagging feasibility issues and edge cases before things are committed
  • Raise questions early when a brief is unclear or something doesn't add up - we'd rather hear it upfront than discover it in engineering

 

Growth path over 12–18 months:

  • Run user research and testing sessions directly with organisers, artists, and judges
  • Build out a lightweight design system our UI developers can work from without asking
  • Shape product thinking earlier - helping us decide what to build, not just how it should look

 

The Offer

  • £1,300–£1,400/month paid in GBP - stable against local currency fluctuation
  • Health insurance contribution
  • 21 days paid holiday plus Egyptian public holidays
  • Work within an Egypt-based team but to the standards of a UK product company
  • Direct access to the Founder, the PM, and the product roadmap
  • A clear growth path as you take on more ownership
  • Work that reaches 500+ arts organisations and 180,000 creators worldwide

 

Practical details:

  • Direct contractor engagement. You'll handle your own tax and social insurance - salary accounts for it, and the team can share their experiences
  • Use your own laptop to start; we'll provide a company machine after three months
  • Application to offer within one month
requirements:
Must-haves:

  • 3+ years of Product Design or UI/UX Design experience - ideally some time on a SaaS product with more than one type of user
  • A portfolio showing clean, thoughtful Figma work and shipped product - we care more about clarity of thinking than polish of pixels
  • Strong Figma craft - components, auto-layout, interactive prototypes, tidy files
  • Clear written and verbal English - you'll be reporting to a UK-based Founder and most of our collaboration happens async in writing
  • Comfort working directly with engineers and understanding when a design decision creates a build problem
  • Self-management - you can run your own time and priorities without being chased
  • Design for how things work, not just how they look
  • Willing to raise problems early rather than solve around them quietly

 

Bonus points:

  • Experience running user research or testing (Maze, Useberry, Lookback or similar)
  • Familiarity with accessibility standards (WCAG)
  • Exposure to complex form-heavy or multi-role workflows - where getting the logic right matters as much as the layout
  • A view on where AI tooling is changing design practice, and where it isn't
  • Care about the creative sector we serve

As the firm scales across multiple practice areas and geographies, we are establishing a people function to support the next stage of growth.

The Human Resources Generalist will serve as the operational backbone of the people function at ExpoStudios.

You will design, implement, and run systems that support three distinct talent groups:

This role is suited for someone who thrives in a build-from-scratch environment. You will not inherit a mature function, you will create it.

  • Manage version control, code reviews (PRs), and automate CI/CD pipelines efficiently using GitHub Actions and Jenkins.

  • Excellent experience in building UI components using Blazor and solid frontend skills (HTML, CSS, JavaScript).
  • Hands-on experience with .NET MAUI (or strong background in Xamarin with readiness to use MAUI).

  • Advanced proficiency in Git and the GitHub ecosystem.

title: Odoo Developer
salary: {'min': None, 'max': None, 'currency': None, 'period': None, 'additionalDetails': None, 'isPaid': True}
description:
Senior Odoo Developer — Integrations & Financial Reporting

About the Project

We are a digital agency (Anecdote) with our in-house development team, running Odoo as the operational hub for project management, campaign workflows, and finance. We maintain custom modules that link external advertising and analytics platforms to Odoo — automating budget tracking, media planning, and performance reporting — and extend Odoo's accounting layer for localised financial statements, asset management, and bank reconciliation. The stack is cloud-hosted in a containerised deployment with CI/CD automation.

 

What You'll Work On

 

  • Third-party integrations: Maintain and extend connections to advertising and analytics platforms via REST/JSON APIs and their SDKs — handling data sync, TTL-based caching, and robust error handling.
  • Campaign & project workflows: Build and evolve wizards and automation that translate campaign planning data into structured Odoo work items (tasks, budgets, timelines) and generate QWeb reports with KPI summaries.
  • Budget & time tracking: Develop models and logic for rolling budget computation, variable service pricing, and time allocation across hierarchical task structures.
  • Accounting & financial reporting: Extend core Odoo accounting with additional reports (PDF and Excel), financial statements, asset tracking flows, and reconciliation support.
  • Custom views & OWL components: Create and maintain Kanban/List view extensions, field widgets, and OWL components — including custom styling where needed.
  • Platform & CI/CD: Work within a Docker-based local dev environment and a CI pipeline that builds, tests, and deploys to a container registry on merge.
  • Test coverage: Champion automated testing — writing model-level and integration tests to establish a growing safety net across the codebase.

 

Tech Stack

 

  • ERP: Odoo
  • Backend: Python, Odoo ORM
  • Frontend: OWL (Odoo Web Library), JavaScript, SCSS
  • External APIs: Advertising/marketing platform APIs
  • Database: PostgreSQL
  • Reporting: QWeb (PDF), openpyxl (Excel)
  • Containerisation: Docker, Docker Compose
  • CI/CD: Bitbucket Pipelines, container registry

 

How We Work

 

  • Module-first architecture: every feature lives in its own addon with clean __manifest__.py dependency declarations — new work follows the same pattern.
  • Small, focused team: compact dev team where each engineer owns full vertical slices (model → view → report → deployment).
  • Docker-native workflow: local dev runs entirely in containers via Docker Compose; there is no bare-metal Odoo setup.
  • CI on merge: builds are image-cached to keep pipeline times short; deployments are triggered automatically on merge.
  • Growing test culture: we want someone who will help establish and expand automated test coverage — this is an active priority, not an afterthought.
  • Code style: consistent use of Odoo decorator patterns and access-control matrices.
requirements:
Must-Have Qualifications

 

  • 3+ years of Odoo development.
  • Python ORM mastery: computed/related fields with @api.depends, @api.[removed], @api.constrains, _sql_constraints, and CRUD overrides (create, write, unlink).
  • Model inheritance patterns: _inherit (extension), abstract mixins, and TransientModel wizards.
  • Security model: authoring ir.model.access.csv, record rules (ir.rule), group-based permissions, and knowing when (and when not) to use sudo().
  • QWeb reports: designing and debugging XML report templates that produce both PDF and structured data output.
  • External API integration: consuming REST/JSON APIs from Python with proper error handling; hands-on experience with at least one third-party SDK.
  • Odoo JS ecosystem: custom OWL components, extending standard Kanban/List controllers, understanding the asset bundle pipeline.
  • Docker: comfortable writing and debugging docker-compose.yml files; able to trace build failures through multi-stage Dockerfile logic.

 

Nice-to-Have

 

  • Major ad platform APIs (e.g. Meta, Tiktok, Snapchat) — existing familiarity with advertising platform APIs shortens onboarding significantly.
  • Accounting domain knowledge — understanding of double-entry bookkeeping, asset depreciation schedules, and bank reconciliation flows.
  • AWS & Bitbucket Pipelines — experience with cloud container registries and pipeline YAML configuration is a plus.
  • openpyxl / xlsxwriter — used for Excel report exports; ability to produce formatted multi-sheet workbooks.
  • Bank statement parsing — familiarity with OFX/QIF formats or relevant parsing libraries.
  • PostgreSQL performance tuning — the reporting layer will benefit from query-level optimisation as data grows.
  • pytest-odoo or Odoo test runner — experience writing TransactionCase and HttpCase tests; bootstrapping a test suite from scratch is highly valued.

description:
Ralliton Limited — Cyprus-headquartered Microsoft partner

About Ralliton

Ralliton is a Cyprus-based Microsoft partner. We design and operate cloud, hybrid, and on-premise environments for mid-market and enterprise customers across Cyprus, Greece, and the wider region. Our work spans Microsoft 365, Microsoft Azure, hybrid identity, Windows Server estates, cybersecurity (Microsoft Defender and Microsoft Sentinel), Intune / MDM, and NIS2 compliance advisory.

We are scaling. Our customers are moving from pure on-premise into hybrid and cloud-first architectures, and they expect a partner who can architect across all three worlds — not push one product. We are building a remote engineering hub in Egypt to support this growth.

The Role

You will be Ralliton's first Solution Architect — the senior technical authority on customer-facing solution design. You sit between Sales and Delivery: you turn customer problems into Microsoft architectures that our engineers can build, our customers can sign for, and Microsoft will recognise as Solutions Partner-grade work.
requirements:
Solution design 

  • Lead the architecture of customer engagements across Microsoft 365, Azure, hybrid identity (Active Directory + Entra ID), Windows Server, Microsoft Defender, Microsoft Sentinel, and Intune.
  • Design hybrid and on-premise to cloud migrations — Exchange hybrid, AD to Entra, file server to SharePoint, on-prem workloads to Azure / Azure Stack HCI / Azure Arc.
  • Design Microsoft Sentinel deployments — workspace topology, data connectors, analytics rules, SOAR playbooks, multi-tenant management for MSP-style delivery.
  • Run architecture working sessions with customer technical stakeholders. Produce High-Level Designs, Low-Level Designs, and Bills of Materials.
  • Make the technical trade-offs visible: cost, risk, data residency (NIS2), licence model, operational complexity.

Pre-sales authority

  • Author Statements of Work, scoping documents, and effort estimates. You are the final word on whether a deal can be delivered as scoped.
  • Respond to RFPs and tenders.

Reference architectures and productisation 

  • Build Ralliton's reusable reference architectures library: M365 secure baseline, Azure landing zone, hybrid identity blueprint, Windows Server modernisation pattern, Defender deployment template, Microsoft Sentinel deployment template (multi-tenant MSP edition), Intune baseline, NIS2-aligned tenant configuration.
  • Convert one-off customer wins into repeatable service offerings with fixed scope and fixed price.

Microsoft partnership 

  • Contribute to Ralliton's Microsoft Solutions Partner designations (Modern Work, Security, Infrastructure).
  • Keep your certifications current; mentor the engineering team on certification roadmaps.
  • Engage with Microsoft technical resources (FastTrack, partner architects, ATU specialists) on customer engagements.

description:
Employment Type: Full-time (or Senior Contractor)
Reporting to: Head of Managed Services / Technical Lead
 

Role Summary
We are seeking an experienced Senior Database Administrator to lead database vendor-support activities and provide expert-level operational, performance, and architectural support across a heterogeneous environment (MongoDB, MySQL/MariaDB, Microsoft SQL Server, and others). This hands-on role is responsible for resolving critical tickets, driving stability and performance improvements, coordinating vendor escalations, and mentoring junior DBAs. The Senior DBA will be a key escalation point for complex incidents and lead database-related projects including migrations, HA designs, and automation.
 

Key Responsibilities

  • Serve as primary escalation engineer for complex database incidents and SLA breaches; lead incident response and post-incident root-cause analysis (RCA).
  • Troubleshoot and resolve high-severity tickets across MongoDB, MySQL/MariaDB, MS SQL Server, and other DBMS; coordinate cross-team and vendor escalations as required.
  • Design, implement and maintain high-availability, replication, clustering, sharding, and disaster recovery solutions; lead DR planning and periodic DR tests.
  • Lead performance tuning efforts: query optimization, indexing strategy, resource contention mitigation, and capacity planning for large-scale production systems.
  • Architect and execute database migrations and upgrades (on-prem ↔ cloud, cloud-to-cloud, major version upgrades), ensuring minimal downtime and reliable rollback plans.
  • Define and enforce database change control processes; review and approve schema changes and major configuration adjustments.
  • Implement and maintain robust backup/restore strategies (including point-in-time recovery) and ensure recoverability through regular restore testing.
  • Develop and maintain database security best practices: roles and permissions, encryption at rest/in transit, auditing, and compliance controls.
  • Build and improve observability and monitoring (alerts, dashboards, anomaly detection) using tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, New Relic, Percona Monitoring, or vendor solutions.
  • Automate repetitive operational tasks and integrate database operations into CI/CD pipelines using scripting (Python, Bash) and IaC tools (Ansible, Terraform).
  • Collaborate with application, infrastructure, and security teams to design scalable data architectures that meet performance, reliability, and compliance requirements.
  • Maintain thorough documentation: runbooks, SOPs, capacity forecasts, architecture diagrams, and vendor escalation procedures.
  • Mentor and coach junior DBAs and support engineers; lead knowledge transfer and run regular training sessions.
  • Participate in on-call rotation for critical incidents and provide after-hours support when required.
requirements:
• Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, or equivalent experience.
  • 4+ years of hands-on DBA experience with strong, demonstrable expertise in at least two of: MongoDB, MySQL/MariaDB, Microsoft SQL Server.
  • Proven track record of resolving complex production incidents and driving long-term improvements.
  • Deep SQL expertise and experience optimizing complex queries, indexing strategies, and execution plans; familiarity with MongoDB query optimization and sharding strategies.
  • Strong experience with HA, replication, clustering, sharding, and disaster recovery design and operations.
  • Hands-on experience with cloud-managed database services (AWS RDS/Aurora, Azure SQL, Google Cloud SQL, MongoDB Atlas) and hybrid cloud deployments.
  • Experience with database migration projects, schema evolution strategies, and zero-downtime deployment techniques.
  • Proficiency with monitoring/observability tools and log analysis; strong diagnostic skills for performance and resource-related issues.
  • Scripting/automation skills (Python, Bash, PowerShell) and experience with configuration management / IaC (Ansible, Terraform, CI/CD tooling).
  • Solid understanding of Linux and Windows server environments, storage, and networking as they relate to database performance.
  • Excellent communication skills; comfortable coordinating with vendors (MongoDB, Microsoft, Oracle, etc.) and presenting technical information to stakeholders.
  • Strong documentation skills and commitment to operational excellence and compliance.
  • English proficiency required for vendor interaction and technical documentation.

Preferred / Nice-to-have

  • Certifications: MongoDB DBA, Microsoft Certified: Azure Database Administrator, MySQL/MariaDB certifications, or similar.
  • Experience with containerized databases and Kubernetes operators (e.g., MongoDB Kubernetes Operator, MySQL Operator).
  • Familiarity with observability platforms (ELK/EFK stacks), query profilers, and advanced performance tools (Query Store, EXPLAIN ANALYZE).
  • Prior experience working with global enterprise customers, RFP-managed services, or partner ecosystems (e.g., Dell Technologies).
  • Experience with security and compliance frameworks (ISO 27001, SOC2, PCI-DSS).

Deliverables & KPIs

  • SLA adherence and mean time to resolution (MTTR) for high-severity incidents.
  • Reduction in recurring incidents (trend-based KPIs) after RCA implementations.
  • Successful execution of migrations/upgrades with minimal downtime.
  • Availability and reliability metrics for database platforms (uptime, replication lag).
  • Timeliness and quality of runbooks, documentation, and knowledge transfer sessions.

Role Overview

The IT Project Manager is responsible for planning, executing, and delivering technology projects such as software development, infrastructure upgrades, system integrations, or digital transformation initiatives. They bridge the gap between business needs and technical execution.

1. Project Planning & Strategy

description:
BIM Engineering Manager

Alex Fort Worth S.A.E.
Location: Alexandria, Egypt
Industry: EPC / EPCM / Industrial Projects

Job Description

Alex Fort Worth is hiring a BIM Engineering Manager to lead BIM implementation and multidisciplinary model coordination across industrial EPC/EPCM projects. The role is responsible for driving BIM strategy, improving coordination between disciplines, reducing clashes, supporting constructability, and linking engineering design with fabrication and site execution.

The ideal candidate will have strong experience in industrial and electromechanical projects, steel structures, mechanical equipment integration, and brownfield environments.

Job Responsibilities

  • Develop and implement BIM standards, procedures, and workflows across projects.
  • Prepare project-specific BIM Execution Plans based on project scope and requirements.
  • Lead BIM implementation from design through construction and handover.
  • Manage multidisciplinary BIM models across civil, structural, steel, mechanical, piping, electrical, and electromechanical systems.
  • Lead clash detection sessions, model reviews, and coordination meetings.
  • Ensure model accuracy, completeness, and compliance with project requirements.
  • Support the production of coordinated drawings, installation drawings, and as-built models.
  • Coordinate with engineering, fabrication, construction, and site teams to support execution.
  • Participate in project meetings with clients, consultants, subcontractors, and internal stakeholders.
  • Lead and develop BIM engineers, modelers, and coordinators.
  • Prepare BIM progress reports, coordination logs, and issue trackers.

About Alex Fort Worth

Alex Fort Worth S.A.E. is an Egyptian Joint-Stock company based in Alexandria, established in 2014 to deliver high-quality local EPC/EPCM services for small- to medium-sized industrial projects in Egypt. The company specializes in engineering, fabrication, steel works, brownfield projects, mechanical equipment replacement, turnkey electromechanical projects, and bulk handling equipment.
requirements:
• Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Architecture, or a related discipline.
  • BIM certification is highly preferred.
  • Minimum 8–12 years of experience in BIM, engineering coordination, or digital project delivery.
  • At least 3–5 years in a managerial or leadership BIM role.
  • Proven experience in industrial EPC/EPCM projects.
  • Strong experience in one or more of the following:
    • Steel structures
    • Mechanical equipment installation or replacement
    • Electromechanical systems
    • Brownfield projects
    • Bulk handling systems
  • Experience in fabrication-oriented environments and coordination between engineering and site execution is highly desirable.
  • Proficiency in Revit, Navisworks, AutoCAD, Tekla Structures, Civil 3D, and BIM 360 / Autodesk Construction Cloud.
  • Strong knowledge of BIM workflows, model coordination, clash detection, shop drawings, as-built documentation, and industrial engineering drawings.

title: IT Manager
salary: {'min': None, 'max': None, 'currency': None, 'period': None, 'additionalDetails': None, 'isPaid': True}
description:
1) Job Purpose
The IT Manager is responsible for planning, managing, and optimizing the company’s information technology infrastructure and IT services. This role ensures reliable systems availability, secure operations, effective support to internal teams, and continuous improvement of IT processes. The IT Manager will lead day-to-day IT operations, coordinate with vendors, and ensure alignment with business needs and the technology strategy set by the Head of Technology.

2) Key Responsibilities
A. IT Operations & Infrastructure Management

  • Oversee the maintenance and performance of core IT infrastructure (servers, networks, endpoints, internet connectivity, Wi-Fi, telecom where applicable).
  • Manage system uptime, capacity planning, and performance monitoring.
  • Ensure IT environment is secure, scalable, and aligned with organizational needs.
  • Coordinate upgrades, patching, and lifecycle management for hardware/software.

B. End-User Support & Service Delivery

  • Manage the IT helpdesk/support function (ticketing, troubleshooting, incident resolution).
  • Ensure timely resolution of IT issues and adherence to service-level targets.
  • Improve user experience through documentation, training, and self-service knowledge bases.
  • Ensure proper onboarding/offboarding for employees and contractors (accounts, access, equipment, permissions).

C. Security, Compliance & Risk Management

  • Implement and maintain security controls including access management, MFA, endpoint protection, patch compliance, and backup policies.
  • Ensure security best practices are followed across systems and users (least privilege, role-based access).
  • Coordinate with technology leadership to maintain compliance with relevant policies and standards.
  • Conduct or coordinate periodic security reviews, vulnerability scanning, and remediation tracking.
  • Maintain audit readiness by ensuring logs, policies, and evidence are stored properly.

D. Identity & Access Management (IAM)

  • Manage identity lifecycle processes: provisioning, deprovisioning, and role changes.
  • Ensure user permissions and access rights are aligned with job responsibilities.
  • Oversee password policies, MFA enforcement, and account recovery processes.

E. Systems, Applications & Integrations (as applicable)

  • Support internal applications and tools (ERP/CRM/WMS/e-commerce tools, internal portals, etc.) within the IT scope.
  • Coordinate with business owners and the Head of Technology for integration requirements and enhancements.
  • Manage APIs/integration connectivity where applicable (e.g., SSO, data sync, third-party tools).

F. Network & Communication Management

  • Manage LAN/WAN/Wi-Fi setup and reliability.
  • Oversee IP addressing, DNS, DHCP, VPN access, and firewall policies.
  • Coordinate with internet service providers and network vendors to handle outages and SLA issues.

G. Backup, Disaster Recovery & Business Continuity

  • Ensure backups are performed successfully and regularly tested.
  • Maintain disaster recovery plans and participate in DR drills (at least annually or per policy).
  • Track RPO/RTO targets with leadership and ensure operational readiness.

H. Vendor Management & Procurement

  • Manage relationships with IT vendors and service providers (hardware, software, managed services).
  • Evaluate vendor performance, negotiate renewals, and ensure SLA compliance.
  • Support procurement planning with the Head of Technology and Finance (where relevant).
  • Maintain asset inventory and contract documentation.

I. IT Documentation & Process Improvement

  • Maintain documentation for systems, networks, access procedures, and operational runbooks.
  • Improve IT processes using ticketing workflows, change management, and root-cause analysis.
  • Build standardized onboarding documentation and SOPs for key IT operations.
  • Support internal audits by ensuring processes are measurable and traceable.

J. Budgeting & Planning

  • Assist with annual IT budget planning: software, hardware, subscriptions, and services.
  • Track and report IT spend, forecast needs, and recommend cost-optimization opportunities.
  • Ensure IT expenditures align with business priorities and technology roadmap.

K. Team Leadership (if applicable)

  • Lead/mentor junior IT staff and/or contractors.
  • Assign tasks, set priorities, manage workloads, and maintain training plans.
  • Ensure escalation practices are followed for critical incidents.
requirements:
1) Required Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field (or equivalent experience).
  • Proven experience in IT management or systems/network administration (typically 7+ years total, including at least 2 years in a leadership or managerial capacity).
  • Strong knowledge of IT infrastructure and operations in a business environment.
  • Hands-on experience with network and endpoint troubleshooting.
  • Demonstrated experience with IT service management (ticketing tools, incident/change/problem management).
  • Strong understanding of cybersecurity fundamentals: IAM, endpoint security, backups, patching, logging/monitoring.


2) Preferred Qualifications (Nice to Have)

  • Certifications such as:
  • ITIL (or ITSM exposure)
  • Security+ / CISSP (or equivalent)
  • Microsoft/Azure certifications (e.g., AZ-104) or AWS/GCP basics
  • Network certifications (e.g., CCNA/CCNP) if relevant to your environment
  • Experience supporting ERP/CRM/WMS/e-commerce platforms and integrations.
  • Experience with cloud infrastructure (Azure/AWS/GCP) and cloud security basics.
  • Experience setting up DR/BCP strategies.
  • Experience with SSO/MFA and enterprise identity systems.


3) Technical Competencies (Expected Skill Areas)

  • Windows and/or Linux administration
  • Networking fundamentals (DNS, DHCP, routing, firewall concepts, VPN)
  • Endpoint management and security (EDR/AV, patch management)
  • Backup systems and restore testing
  • Ticketing tools / ITSM systems (e.g., Jira Service Management, ServiceNow, Zendesk, etc.)
  • Monitoring/observability basics (system logs, alerting)
  • Documentation and runbook creation
  • Change management discipline


4) Soft Skills & Leadership Competencies

  • Strong problem-solving and structured troubleshooting
  • Clear communication with non-technical stakeholders
  • Ability to prioritize incidents and manage escalations
  • Ownership mindset and accountability for service reliability
  • Process-driven approach and continuous improvement mindset
  • Vendor negotiation and stakeholder management


5) Scope & Work Context

  • Collaborates closely with:
  • Head of Technology (technology direction, roadmap alignment)
  • Operations/HR/Finance (service needs, access, payroll/finance systems support)
  • Vendors and service providers
  • Works with company policies related to:
  • IT security
  • Data privacy and handling
  • Asset management
  • Access control and compliance


6) Reporting & Escalation

  • Reports progress, key metrics, incidents, and risks to the Head of Technology.
  • Provides immediate escalation for critical service outages, security incidents, or major vendor failures.

description:
Role

Dewan Architects & Engineers is a global design consultancy firm with 900+ professionals across offices in the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Vietnam, the Philippines, and Iraq. We are seeking an Identity & Access Management (IAM) Specialist to join our Cairo office. In this role, you will own and support IAM operations across the organization, ensuring the right people have the right access to the right systems at the right time, while strengthening security through best-practice controls, automation, and governance. You will work closely with IT, Information Security, and business stakeholders, and support other regional offices during standard business hours (M–F; 8:00am – 5:00pm).

 

What You Will Do

  • Communicate and collaborate effectively with all levels of staff from end users to managers and Principals to deliver secure, user-friendly access solutions.
  • Manage the Joiner–Mover–Leaver (JML) lifecycle: provisioning, access changes, and timely deprovisioning.
  • Administer and maintain identity platforms (e.g., Microsoft Active Directory / Entra ID) including groups, roles, and access policies.
  • Implement and support SSO, MFA, conditional access, and federation for enterprise and cloud applications (e.g., SAML, OAuth/OIDC).
  • Enforce least-privilege access using RBAC/ABAC concepts; review privileged access and support PAM controls where applicable.
  • Own IAM governance activities: periodic access reviews/recertifications, role design, approvals workflow, and segregation-of-duties support.
  • Integrate and onboard applications into IAM (SaaS, on-prem, and cloud), partnering with application owners to define access models.
  • Support identity-related incident response (e.g., suspicious logins, compromised accounts, access misuse) and improve preventive controls.
  • Maintain accurate records for access requests, approvals, reviews, and audit evidence; create and update IAM documentation and SOPs.
  • Contribute to IT security and infrastructure projects as required and continually expand knowledge of Dewan’s technology landscape.
  • Demonstrate ethical and professional behavior and adherence to company policies and procedures.
requirements:
Qualifications

 

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Cybersecurity, or a related field (or equivalent experience).
  • 3+ years of hands-on experience in IAM / Access Management / Directory Services in an enterprise environment.
  • Strong working knowledge of Active Directory, Entra ID (Azure AD), group/role management, and identity lifecycle processes.
  • Experience with SSO and federation (SAML 2.0, OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect) and MFA/conditional access policy design.
  • Familiarity with ticketing processes, change control, and maintaining clear support records in a fast-paced environment.
  • Strong troubleshooting and communication skills; ability to work independently and as part of a team.
  • Willingness to participate in occasional off-hours/weekend support for upgrades and initiatives.

 

Bonus Points

  • Experience with IAM vendors (e.g., Okta, Ping, SailPoint, Saviynt, Microsoft Identity Manager / Entra ID Governance).
  • Scripting/automation skills (PowerShell, Python) for provisioning, reporting, and audit evidence generation.
  • Security certifications (e.g., SC-300, AZ-500, Security+, CISSP) or ITIL.

Experience supporting geographically distributed operations and multi-region access requirements.

description:
Summary:

Responsible for managing end-to-end payroll, overseeing daily HR operations, and handling administrative functions, ensuring accuracy, compliance, and smooth employee experience.

 Scope of Responsibilities: -

1. Human Resources Operations (HR Operations).

A. Payroll Inputs, Attendance & Government Compliance (Primary Focus)

• Managing biometric/electronic attendance systems.
• Preparing monthly attendance sheets and reports.
• Calculating lateness, absences, overtime, and deductions.
• Preparing and submitting monthly payroll input reports (variables) for HR Manager approval.
• Monitoring and following up on company obligations toward government entities and funds, including:
(emergency fund, martyr fund, penalties, training fund, social and health services funds, and social insurance).

B. Employee Lifecycle Management (Onboarding, Offboarding & Asset Management)

• Preparing workstations and required setup for new hires (desk, chair, computer/laptop, mobile line, email account).
• Coordinating with IT for equipment delivery and system access.
• Managing employee custody forms and ensuring proper documentation in employee files.
• Overseeing employee offboarding procedures and ensuring full recovery of company assets.

C. Medical Insurance & Employee Benefits

• Managing medical insurance contracts administratively and operationally.
• Handling employee medical insurance requests and coordinating with providers.
• Managing transportation allowances and mobile lines/packages.
• Responding to employee inquiries related to benefits.
• Monitoring utilization of employee benefits.
• Preparing monthly reports on benefits usage and cost.
• Suggesting improvements or restructuring of benefits packages when needed.

D. Company Vehicle Management

• Coordinating the use of company-owned and leased vehicles according to operational needs across headquarters, branches, and sites.
• Monitoring and evaluating driver performance and adherence to schedules and discipline.

2. Administration

A. Facilities, Assets & Sites Management

• Supervising maintenance operations for headquarters and branches (electrical, HVAC, plumbing, furniture, and fixtures).
• Managing preventive and corrective maintenance contracts.
• Developing and implementing preventive maintenance plans to reduce breakdowns.
• Managing administrative assets (furniture, equipment, office supplies, company vehicles).
• Supervising lease agreements and utility services (water, electricity, internet, telecommunications).
• Providing temporary workforce for construction sites across company projects inside and outside El Shorouk.
• Providing required manpower for company operations.
• Managing wages and payments for temporary labor at construction sites.
• Ensuring provision of site and office requirements including pantry, cleaning, and security services.
• Conducting periodic inspections across construction sites, branches, and sales offices.

B. Security, Cleaning & Pantry Services

• Providing pantry and cleaning supplies across all company locations (sites, branches, and offices).
• Supervising security and cleaning personnel administratively.
• Setting KPIs for security services (discipline, uniform compliance, visitor logs).
• Ensuring compliance with professional cleaning and hygiene standards.
• Supervising pantry operations and monitoring consumption and costs.
• Preparing monthly reports on service quality, compliance, and discipline.

3. Administrative Oversight – Malls (Non-Operational)

• Conducting periodic inspections of company-managed malls.
• Reviewing the performance of security and cleaning services.
• Ensuring adherence to company standards in appearance and operations.
• Preparing monthly evaluation reports for the HR Manager.
• Coordinating with mall management regarding service issues or violations.

  • High attention to detail and ability to handle confidential data
  • Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple tasks

description:

  • Provide first-level troubleshooting and guidance to users.
  • Assist users with account access, and general app navigation.

2. Issue Logging & Documentation

  • Record all cases accurately in the help desk/ticketing system.
  • Classify issues by priority and impact level.
  • Maintain proper documentation of recurring issues and resolutions.

3. Technical Troubleshooting (Level 1 Support)

  • Identify whether the issue is user-related, operational, or technical.
  • Resolve basic issues such as:
    • Login errors
    • OTP problems
    • Minor booking adjustments
    • Profile updates
  • Escalate complex technical bugs to the App Development Company.

4. Escalation & Vendor Coordination

  • Prepare clear technical reports for escalated issues.
  • Communicate with the App Development Company regarding system bugs or required fixes.
  • Follow up regularly until resolution is implemented.
  • Test and confirm fixes before closing tickets.

5. Monitoring & Reporting

  • Monitor application performance and recurring system issues.
  • Provide weekly/monthly reports on:
    • Number of tickets received
    • Issue categories
    • Resolution time
    • Pending escalations
  • Suggest improvements to enhance user experience.

6. Quality & Compliance

  • Ensure data confidentiality and compliance with company privacy policies.
  • Maintain service-level agreements (SLAs) for response and resolution times.

7. Trainings

description:
We are looking for a Senior Business Analyst with solid experience in the software industry to join our team. The ideal candidate must have proven hands-on experience in requirements gathering, business analysis, stakeholder communication, and preparing high-quality Business Requirements Documents (BRDs) for custom software projects.

 

This role is critical to the success of our delivery team, thus we are looking for someone who can engage confidently with clients, understand business needs, translate them into clear and structured documentation, and work closely with internal technical teams to ensure requirements are properly understood and executed.

 

Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct discovery sessions, workshops, and requirement-gathering meetings with clients and internal stakeholders
  • Analyze business needs, operational processes, and project objectives, then translate them into clear software requirements
  • Prepare and maintain professional project documentation including:
    • Business Requirements Documents (BRDs)
    • Software Requirements Specifications (SRSs)
    • Functional requirements
    • User stories and acceptance criteria
    • Use cases and process flows
    • Gap analysis and solution recommendations
  • Work closely with project managers, UI/UX designers, developers, and QA teams throughout the project lifecycle
  • Define scope boundaries, identify assumptions, dependencies, constraints, and business rules
  • Review and validate requirements with stakeholders to ensure alignment before development begins
  • Support change request analysis and requirement traceability during project execution
  • Participate in solution discussions and help bridge communication between business and technical teams
  • Ensure requirements are documented in a structured, professional, and implementation-ready manner
requirements:
• Proven experience as a Business Analyst in a software development company
  • Strong practical experience in preparing BRDs for software projects

description:

With technical support from the HP Manager Mission and in close collaboration with the medical team and Implementation Partner, implement health promotion and community engagement activities targeting patients and caretakers to improve their knowledge and skills on relevant medical topics.

To facilitate clinic activities for Health promotion component with communication via hotline, conduct patient survey and collect patient feedback, track follow-up and defaulters.

 

Accountabilities:

  • Under the guide of HP Manager, assess the impact of activities (with questions, verifications and behaviors observations), and report problems, success and constraints to him/her.

Specific Accountabilities:

description:
The B2B Sales Advisor will be responsible for selling YourParts’ product portfolio to fleet owners, logistics companies, rental operators, corporate fleets, and other commercial customers. This is a field-facing role combining consultative selling, territory management, and technical product knowledge. The successful candidate will identify opportunities, manage the sales cycle end-to-end, and deliver tailored solutions that reduce downtime and total cost of ownership for fleet customers.

 

  • Develop and manage a sales territory focused on fleet and commercial accounts.
  • Generate new business through prospecting, cold-calling, networking, industry events, and referrals.
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with decision-makers (fleet managers, maintenance supervisors, procurement).
  • Conduct needs analysis and present consultative, value-driven proposals tailored to fleet requirements (parts, kits, service agreements).
  • Manage the full sales cycle: lead qualification, product demonstrations, quotations, negotiations, contract closure, and handover to operations for fulfillment.
  • Achieve and exceed monthly/quarterly sales targets and KPIs (new accounts, revenue, average order value, retention).
  • Maintain accurate CRM records (opportunities, pipeline, customer interactions) and provide regular sales forecasts and reports.
  • Collaborate with Customer Service, Operations, and Technical teams to ensure timely delivery, warranty support, and high customer satisfaction.
  • Provide product and technical guidance to customers; escalate complex technical issues to product specialists when needed.
  • Promote cross-selling and upselling of complementary products and services.
  • Represent YourParts at industry trade shows, fleet meetups, and customer site visits; prepare and deliver presentations when required.
  • Support post-sale relationship management to drive renewals, repeat business, and referrals.
requirements:
Essential qualifications & experience

  • Engineering degree (mechanical, automotive, electrical, or related) — mandatory.
  • 0–3 years of experience in sales, field service, technical support, or a related customer-facing role; experience selling to fleets or in aftermarket/automotive sectors is an advantage.
  • Must own a personal car and be willing to travel across the assigned territory frequently.
  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills; ability to build credibility with technical and procurement stakeholders.
  • Consultative selling mindset with proven ability to identify customer pain points and present tailored solutions.
  • Basic technical understanding of automotive parts, maintenance practices, and fleet operations.
  • Comfortable using CRM systems, Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint), and mobile sales tools.
  • Proactive, results-oriented, organized, and able to manage multiple accounts and priorities.
  • Valid driver’s license and clean driving record.

Preferred

  • Prior exposure to B2B sales processes, tendering, or contract negotiations.
  • Experience working in fast-paced, startup-like environments.

Core competencies & behaviors

  • Customer-first attitude with strong problem-solving skills.
  • Persuasive communicator and active listener.
  • Self-motivated, disciplined, and comfortable working autonomously in the field.
  • Team player who collaborates with internal stakeholders to deliver value.
  • High integrity and professional presentation.

description:
Job Purpose:

We are seeking a proactive and customer-focused IT Help Desk to serve as the first point of contact for our employees' technical issues. You will be responsible for providing timely and effective technical assistance, resolving problems with hardware, software, and network systems, and ensuring a seamless technology experience for our end-users. The ideal candidate is a problem-solver with excellent communication skills and a passion for technology.

 

Key Responsibilities:

Technical Support & Troubleshooting (70%)

  •   Provide first-line technical support via phone, email, chat, and in-person requests.
  •   Diagnose and resolve hardware issues with laptops, desktops, printers, and mobile devices.
  •   Troubleshoot software problems related to operating systems (Windows, macOS), Microsoft 365 and a variety of business applications.
  •   Assist users with account management, including password resets, access permissions, and onboarding/offboarding.
  •   Escalate complex issues to Tier 2/3 support or specialized teams while maintaining ownership of the ticket and communication with the user.

 

System Administration & Maintenance (20%)

  •   Perform the initial setup, configuration, and deployment of new user equipment (laptops, phones, etc.).
  •   Assist in the management of user accounts and groups in Active Directory or Azure AD.
  •   Monitor system alerts and perform basic health checks on network connectivity and core services.
  •   Maintain accurate and up-to-date documentation in the IT knowledge base.

 

Customer Service & Communication (10%)

  •   Deliver exceptional, empathetic, and patient customer service to users of all technical skill levels.
  •   Clearly communicate technical information in a user-friendly, understandable manner.
  •   Manage and prioritize multiple support tickets, ensuring SLAs (Service Level Agreements) are met.
  •   Follow up with users to ensure their technical issues have been fully resolved.
requirements:
Qualifications & Skills

Required:

  • Bachelor’s degree in information technology, Computer Science, or a related field, or equivalent work experience.
  • Proven experience (1-3 years) in a helpdesk or technical support role.
  • Strong knowledge of Microsoft Windows 10/11 and Microsoft 365 Suite (Outlook, Teams, Word, Excel).
  • Fundamental understanding of network concepts (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPN).
  • Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
  • Outstanding written and verbal communication skills.
  • A patient, customer-oriented attitude with a genuine desire to help.

Preferred (Nice-to-Have):

  • Relevant professional certifications (e.g., CompTIA A+, Network+, Microsoft 365 Fundamentals, ITIL Foundation).
  • Experience with a professional ticketing system (e.g., Jira Service Management, Fresh service, Zendesk).
  • Basic experience with Active Directory and Azure AD for user management.
  • Familiarity with macOS and mobile device management (MDM).
  • Knowledge of remote desktop support tools.

job_type:
• Role Overview
  • We are seeking a driven and analytical Senior Financial Analyst to join our FP&A team. In this role, you will be responsible for driving the company's financial forecasting, annual budgeting process, and operating plan variance analysis. You will act as a strategic partner to department leaders, providing the financial insights and modeling necessary to support key business decisions and drive growth.
  • Key Responsibilities
  • 1. Forecasting, Budgeting, and Planning
  • Lead the coordination and execution of the Annual Operating Plan (AOP) and quarterly rolling forecasts.
  • Maintain and improve complex three-statement financial models (Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow) to support long-term strategic planning.
  • Collaborate with department heads to build bottoms-up budgets and track headcount planning.
  • 2. Variance Analysis & Reporting
  • Prepare monthly financial reporting packages for Senior Leadership and the Board of Directors, including P&L analysis and KPI tracking.
  • Conduct monthly variance analysis (Actuals vs. Budget vs. Forecast), identifying key drivers of financial performance and proposing corrective actions.
  • Automate and streamline reporting processes to improve speed and accuracy of financial data.
  • 3. Strategic Decision Support
  • Perform ad-hoc financial analysis for special projects, including ROI analysis for capital investments, new product launches, or market expansion.
  • Analyze trends in revenue, cost of goods sold (COGS), and operating expenses to identify opportunities for margin improvement and cost savings.
  • Translate complex financial data into clear, actionable narratives for non-finance stakeholders.
years_of_exp:
Qualifications & Skills

  • Education: Bachelor’s degree in finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field.
  • Experience: 3–5 years of progressive experience in FP&A, Corporate Finance, or Investment Banking.
  • Technical Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Excel (Index/Match, VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables, VBA macros are a plus) and PowerPoint.
  • Modeling: Proven ability to build dynamic, integrated financial models from scratch.
  • Communication: Strong verbal and written communication skills with the ability to present to leadership.
  • Systems: Experience with ERP systems (e.g., NetSuite, SAP, Oracle) and Corporate Performance Management tools (e.g., Adaptive Insights, Anaplan, Host Analytics).

  • SQL: Basic to intermediate knowledge of SQL for data querying is a strong differentiator.

  • Attention to Detail: Precision in reporting and data integrity is non-negotiable.
  • Autonomy: Ability to manage multiple deadlines and projects with minimal supervision in a fast-paced environment.

The Senior Systems Administrator is responsible for the design, deployment, and ongoing administration of Zewail City’s server and computing infrastructure. The role ensures high availability, security, and optimal performance of all on-premises and hybrid systems , including HP server hardware, Windows Server environments, virtualization platforms, storage, and identity services , in support of the University’s academic and administrative operations.

 

  • 1-Server Infrastructure Administration
  • Deploy, configure, and maintain server hardware (BladeSystem, DL, ML series) including firmware management, ILO configuration, and hardware health monitoring .
  • Administer Windows Server environments (2016/2019/2022) including roles and features, patch management, Group Policy, and performance tuning.
  • Manage and maintain the virtualization platform (VMware vSphere or Hyper-V) including VM provisioning, resource allocation, snapshots, and cluster management.
  • Oversee SAN/NAS storage administration, volume provisioning, capacity planning, and backup integration.
  • Maintain a hardware asset register and lifecycle plan for all server and storage equipment, including warranty tracking and refresh scheduling.
  • 2. Identity, Directory & Access Management
  • Own and administer Active Directory (AD DS) including domain controllers, OU structure, Group Policy Objects, user and computer accounts, and replication health.
  • Manage Azure AD Connect / Microsoft Entra ID sync, ensuring consistent hybrid identity between on-premises AD and the M365 tenant.
  • Administer DNS, DHCP, and NTP services, ensuring reliability and correct resolution across all campus zones.
  • Configure and maintain NPS/RADIUS for 802.1X network access control, integrating with the wireless and wired infrastructure for WPA2-Enterprise authentication.
  • 3. Backup, Recovery & Business Continuity
  • Design, implement, and test backup and disaster recovery procedures for all critical servers, applications, and data, ensuring RPO/RTO targets are defined and met.
  • Manage backup software (Veeam or equivalent), scheduling, retention policies, and offsite/cloud replication to a designated DR site.
  • Conduct and document quarterly DR drills; present results and remediation actions to the IT Director.
  • Maintain runbooks for all critical system recovery procedures, ensuring documentation is current and accessible to authorized team members.
  • 4. Security Hardening & Compliance
  • Apply and maintain security baselines across all server workloads; coordinate patch cycles to meet defined SLAs.
  • Manage Windows Defender, endpoint protection policies, and server audit logging in coordination with the network/security team.
  • Ensure privileged access to server infrastructure follows least-privilege principles, using Microsoft PIM or equivalent for elevated access governance.
  • Support internal audits and institutional compliance requirements by providing system logs, access reports, and configuration evidence as required.
  • 5. Systems Monitoring & Continuous Improvement
  • Deploy and maintain infrastructure monitoring with alerting thresholds, on-call escalation paths, and monthly availability reports.
  • Act as the technical escalation point for systems-related incidents, collaborating with the Application & Automation Manager for application-layer issues and with the network team for infrastructure-level faults.
  • Maintain comprehensive systems documentation including topology diagrams, configuration baselines, change logs, and standard operating procedures.
  • Evaluate and recommend infrastructure improvements, capacity upgrades, and technology refreshes, presenting business cases to the Infrastructure Manager.
