title: Project Controls & Planning Manager (French-Speaking)
description:
Overview

  • The Project & Programme Services (PPS) team is a critical component of the Global Project & Programme Management Office (GPMO).
  • The team delivers predictable and efficient project performance management, reporting, and business intelligence across global portfolios.
  • Operating from the Global Technology Centre (GTC) in India, PPS provides cost-efficient, agile, and scalable programme services using an onshore–offshore delivery model.
  • Our ambition is to become the global leader in Programme Management Services by building a future-ready, digitally enabled, high-performing team.

 

Your Role

  • The Project Controls & Planning Manager is responsible for leading project controls functions for complex, high-value programmes.
  • The role requires advanced expertise in planning, scheduling, cost control, performance analytics, and stakeholder management.
  • The position acts as a specialist advisor, leading teams, guiding clients, resolving issues, and ensuring high-quality delivery across programmes.
  • The Project Controls & Planning Manager will manage client engagements, lead multidisciplinary project control teams, drive best practices, and ensure governance and compliance across the project lifecycle.

 

Planning & Scheduling

  • Develop, lead and manage comprehensive project schedules using Primavera P6, ensuring compliance with the Client /Region specific guidelines/standards.
  • Plan and sequence project activities across all phases, including design, procurement, and construction.
  • Conduct Critical Path Analysis (CPA) and propose mitigation measures to maintain project timelines.
  • Prepare detailed 4-week and 8-week lookahead programs and integrate them into the master schedule.
  • Perform regular updates and integrity checks on project schedules, ensuring alignment with Client /Region specific Schedule Management Manual & DCMA criteria.
  • Identify key dependencies and assess project risks to develop mitigation strategies.
  • Ensure integration of cost, schedule, and resource plans.
  • Track milestones and ensure adherence to key delivery timelines.
  • Identify schedule variances and recommend corrective actions.
  • Guide team in preparation of S-curves, EV reports, dashboards, and schedule analytics.
  • Support project teams with cost-loaded schedules and conduct Earned Value Analysis (EVA) to track project performance.
  • Identify potential schedule risks and incorporate risk mitigation strategies, including quantitative risk analysis (e.g., Monte Carlo simulations).
  • Implement and manage change control processes as per NH guidelines to adjust Performance Measurement Baselines (PMB) for scope or schedule variations.
  • Provide strategic input in meetings, addressing technical planning challenges.
  • Support delay analysis, impact assessment, and time extension claims.
  • Collaborate with planning engineers to improve planning methodologies.

 

Cost Management & Controls

  • Develop, lead and manage budgeting, forecasting, cost monitoring, and financial reporting activities.
  • Establish and manage Cost Breakdown Structures (CBS) aligned with the WBS.
  • Provide detailed cost reports that highlight any discrepancies between actual costs and forecasted budgets, ensuring that project stakeholders are informed promptly.
  • Analyze cost variances and trends to recommend corrective actions.
  • Prepare earned value assessments and monthly cash flow forecasts.
  • Standardize and automate tools for pricing, estimation, and cost tracking.
  • Generate financial dashboards and visual reports to present cost trends, highlighting cost savings, potential risks, and areas requiring attention.
  • Ensure compliance with organizational cost governance processes.
  • Support early warnings, change orders, and client negotiations.

 

Performance Reporting & Analytics

  • Produce and review weekly, monthly, and ad-hoc project performance reports.
  • Create and present accurate reports, including Schedule Narratives, Key Milestone Variance Reports, and Program Review Reports (PRR).
  • Develop, track, and report KPIs across cost, schedule, quality, and risk.
  • Ensure high-quality, consistent reporting standards across all deliverables.
  • Generate Power BI dashboards for progress visualization and stakeholder communication.
  • Preparation and Submission of Monthly Progress Report, Program Attributes List, Change logs, S Curves and CPA Reports, Variance Reports, Trend Analysis reports, EVM dashboards etc.
  • Present project performance insights to senior management and clients.
  • Analyse large datasets and convert insights into actionable recommendations.

 

Team Leadership & Development

  • Act as a Subject matter expert and provide technical guidance and recommendations to the team.
  • Lead, mentor, and manage a team of planners, schedulers, cost controllers, and analysts.
  • Drive capability development and skill enhancement across the team.
  • Conduct performance reviews and ensure continuous professional growth.
  • Maintain healthy team morale, collaboration, and effective conflict resolution.
  • Ensure quality assurance and sign-off for all project control deliverables.
  • Build succession plans and develop next-generation project controls leaders.

 

Stakeholder & Client Engagement

  • Collaborate with multidisciplinary team, project managers, engineering teams, contractors, and clients.
  • Serve as the primary point of contact for Project planning & project controls-related discussions.
  • Ensure alignment of all stakeholders on planning, scheduling, and cost objectives.
  • Participate in client meetings, steering committees, and cross-functional reviews.
  • Maintain strong working relationships to support successful project outcomes.
  • Provide expert guidance to internal and external stakeholders on best practices.
requirements:
Minimum Requirements

  • Minimum 10–15 years of project delivery experience in engineering consultancy, design, or project management environments.
  • Bachelor’s/Master’s degree in Engineering: Civil, Mechanical, Construction Management, Building Technology, or related field.
  • Excellent communication, client-facing, presentation, and report-writing skills.
  • Strong organizational skills, ability to work under pressure and adapt to change.
  • Strong project management acumen and experience in cost & schedule governance.
  • Ability to propose innovative solutions, processes, and working methods.
  • French and English proficiency is a must.

 

Desired Requirements / Technical Expertise

  • Subject Matter Expertise in Planning / Project Controls.
  • Advanced proficiency in Primavera P6 and MS Project.
  • Experience in delay analysis, impact assessments, and baseline development.
  • Proficiency in Cost Management tools (EcoSys preferred).
  • Deep knowledge of Earned Value Management (EVM), CBS, budget control, cash flow, contingency management, and change control.
  • Experience in baseline creation, progress tracking, and CL31, CL32 & CL62 schedule analysis.
  • Experience with global (UK, US, Middle East) transportation, infrastructure, E&M projects.
  • Knowledge of NEC3/NEC4 contracts.
  • Experience in large-scale Enterprise Project Management environments.

 

Data Analytics & Power BI Expertise

  • Advanced Power BI development, including dashboards, data models, DAX, and custom analytics.
  • Ability to analyze large datasets and convert insights into actionable recommendations.
  • Experience with ETL design, automation, and BI system optimization.
  • SQL proficiency for data retrieval and transformation.
  • Experience in automation using VBA, Python, or web technologies is a plus.
  • Strong understanding of O365 productivity suite.
  •  

Certifications (Preferred)

  • Relevant certifications such as Project Management Professional (PMP), AACE’s Certified Cost Professional (CCP), or PMI’s Scheduling Professional (PMI-SP)
  • Primavera / EcoSys Certifications
  • Chartered status or equivalent professional certifications (e.g., RICS, PMP) is added advantage.
  • Other relevant project controls or construction management credentials

 

Soft Skills

  • Strong leadership and people management capability
  • Client-centric approach
  • Analytical and critical-thinking skills
  • Ability to influence and manage conflict
  • Proactive problem solving
  • High emotional intelligence and team motivation ability

description:
Job Summary
We are looking for a Senior Tester / Senior QA Engineer to help us improve the quality, stability, and performance of our SaaS / ERP system.

title: Technical Pre-Sales Engineer - Modular Operating Theatre (OT) Capsules
description:
Job Description:

We are a leading manufacturing factory in Egypt specializing in specialized medical infrastructure. We are seeking a highly technical and commercial Technical Pre-Sales Engineer to join our team.

In this role, you will act as the technical bridge between our production factory and healthcare clients. You will be responsible for translating complex hospital requirements into custom manufactured Modular Operating Theatre (OT) Capsules, managing technical submittals, and securing factory pipeline orders.

Duties & Responsibilities:

  • Tender Management: Review and analyze public and private healthcare tenders to extract technical compliance requirements for modular operating rooms.
  • Technical Submittals & BOQs: Prepare detailed technical proposals, financial offers, Bills of Quantities (BOQs), and compliance sheets for clients and consultants.
  • Site Surveys: Conduct on-site structural, electrical, and mechanical dimensions surveys at hospitals across Egypt to verify installation feasibility before production.
  • Consultant Specification Pitching: Conduct technical presentations to healthcare consultants, biomedical engineers, and hospital directors to specify our factory’s products in upcoming project designs.

Cross-Functional Collaboration: Coordinate directly with the factory production and design teams to ensure custom engineering requests match client specifications.
requirements:
Job Requirements (Keywords & Selection Criteria):

  • Education: B.Sc. in Biomedical, Mechanical, or Electrical Engineering is mandatory.
  • Experience: 3–5 years of solid pre-sales or technical sales experience in Modular Cleanrooms, Operating Theatres, CSSD, or heavy Medical Equipment turnkey projects in Egypt.
  • Technical Skills: Deep understanding of HVAC/HEPA filtration integration, medical gas systems, anti-bacterial materials, and low-current hospital grids.
  • Software Proficiency: Highly proficient in AutoCAD (essential) and Revit/BIM (strongly preferred) to review and modify architectural shop drawings.
  • Language: Fluent in Arabic and very good command of written/spoken English for writing technical proposals.
  • Mobility: Must possess a valid Egyptian driver's license and a personal vehicle for site visits and client meetings.

description:

We're seeking an exceptional individual to champion quality across our cutting-edge engineering initiatives within the dynamic Telecom/Technology sector. This is your chance to make a profound impact, shaping the future of our products and services.

What You'll Be Doing:

  • Strategic Leadership: Define and implement comprehensive Quality Assurance and Quality Control strategies that align with business objectives and drive continuous improvement.
  • Team Empowerment: Lead, mentor, and grow a high-performing team of QA professionals, fostering a culture of innovation, accountability, and excellence.
  • Process Optimization: Establish and refine QA processes, methodologies, and best practices, ensuring efficiency and effectiveness across the entire product lifecycle.
  • Technical Oversight: Oversee the design, development, and execution of test plans, test cases, and automation frameworks for complex Telecom/Technology solutions.
  • Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with Engineering, Product Management, and other cross-functional teams to integrate quality into every stage of development.
  • Risk Mitigation: Proactively identify potential quality risks and implement mitigation strategies to ensure product reliability and customer satisfaction.

You'll leverage your deep expertise in Quality Assurance, Quality Control, and QA methodologies. This role demands a strong understanding of Test Strategy, Process Improvement, and advanced Automation Testing techniques. Experience with Agile Methodologies, Performance Testing, and Risk Management will be critical to your success.

Growth Opportunities:

This isn't just a job; it's a career launchpad! As our Quality Assurance Head, you'll have unparalleled opportunities to influence strategic direction, implement transformative changes, and elevate your leadership skills. We are committed to your professional development, offering continuous learning and advancement within our rapidly expanding organization.

Our Team & Culture:

Join a collaborative, innovative, and supportive team where your contributions are valued, and your voice is heard. We believe in fostering an environment where creativity flourishes, and challenges are met with collective ingenuity. Our culture is built on trust, respect, and a shared commitment to delivering groundbreaking technology.

Your Impact:

You will be instrumental in ensuring the delivery of high-quality, reliable, and innovative products that delight our customers. Your leadership will directly contribute to our reputation for excellence and drive our continued success in the competitive Telecom/Technology landscape. Be the architect of quality for our future!
requirements:

title: IT system engineer
description:
Are you ready to elevate your career in a dynamic and impactful role? Join our innovative team in Cairo, Egypt as an IT System Engineer! We're seeking a passionate and skilled individual to be the backbone of our technological infrastructure, ensuring seamless operations and driving efficiency across our organization. This is an on-site opportunity where your expertise will directly contribute to our success and growth.

Overview: As an IT System Engineer, you will be instrumental in designing, implementing, and maintaining our critical IT systems. You will play a pivotal role in ensuring the stability, security, and performance of our infrastructure, providing expert support, and driving continuous improvement initiatives. If you thrive in a challenging yet rewarding environment and are eager to make a tangible difference, this is the perfect role for you!

  • Responsibilities:
    • Design and Implement: Architect, deploy, and manage robust IT systems, servers, and network infrastructure.
    • Maintain and Optimize: Proactively monitor system performance, perform routine maintenance, and implement optimizations to ensure maximum uptime and efficiency.
    • Troubleshoot and Resolve: Diagnose and resolve complex technical issues, providing timely and effective solutions to minimize disruption.
    • Ensure Security: Implement and enforce security best practices to protect our data and systems from threats.
    • Collaborate and Support: Work closely with cross-functional teams, offering expert IT support and contributing to strategic technology initiatives.
    • Document and Innovate: Maintain comprehensive documentation of systems and processes, and actively seek out new technologies and methodologies to enhance our IT landscape.
  • Skills & Technologies: This role demands a strong foundation in Computer Science and Information Technology (IT), coupled with hands-on experience in system administration, network management, virtualization, and cloud platforms. You'll be leveraging your expertise in areas like scripting, security, and advanced troubleshooting daily.
  • Growth Opportunities: We are committed to your professional development! You'll have access to continuous learning resources, opportunities to lead exciting projects, and a clear path for advancement within our growing IT department. Expand your skill set, take on new challenges, and shape your career with us.
  • Team & Culture: Join a collaborative and supportive team of IT professionals who are passionate about technology and dedicated to excellence. We foster a culture of innovation, mutual respect, and continuous improvement, where your ideas are valued, and your contributions are celebrated.
  • Impact: Your work will directly impact the operational efficiency, security, and technological advancement of our entire organization. You will be a key player in ensuring our systems are resilient, scalable, and ready to support our ambitious business goals.
requirements:
• Required Skills:
    • Computer Science: A strong theoretical and practical understanding of computer science principles.
    • Information Technology (IT): Proven expertise across various IT domains, including hardware, software, and networking.
    • System Administration: Demonstrated ability in managing Windows and/or Linux server environments.
    • Network Configuration: Solid understanding and practical experience with network protocols, routing, firewalls, and VPNs.
    • Troubleshooting: Exceptional diagnostic and problem-solving skills for complex IT issues.
    • Virtualization: Experience with virtualization technologies such as VMware, Hyper-V, or similar.
    • Cloud Computing: Familiarity with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and hybrid environments.
    • Scripting: Proficiency in scripting languages (e.g., PowerShell, Bash, Python) for automation.
    • Security Best Practices: Knowledge of cybersecurity principles and experience implementing security measures.
    • IT Support: Strong ability to provide advanced technical support to end-users and other IT teams.
    • Problem-solving: A proactive and analytical approach to identifying and resolving technical challenges.

    • This is an Experienced level role, seeking candidates who can hit the ground running, take initiative, and contribute significantly from day one. We are looking for someone who is ready to take ownership of critical systems and drive innovation.

title: Software Project Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Project Coordinator to support the successful execution of our software development projects. In this role, you will be responsible for creating and managing the Work Breakdown Structure (WBS), organizing tasks, and maintaining project workflows using tools like JIRA. You will work closely with project managers, developers, and stakeholders to ensure timelines, deliverables, and resources are aligned for project success. The ideal candidate has excellent communication skills, a strong understanding of Agile methodologies, and a proactive approach to solving challenges.

Responsibilities:

  • Develop and maintain the project’s Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) to organize the work into manageable sections. Update the WBS as the project progresses to reflect changes in scope or priorities.
  • Create and assign tasks based on the WBS and project requirements. Break down complex deliverables into actionable and measurable tasks. Monitor task progress and ensure team members have the resources and clarity needed to complete them.
  • JIRA Administration tasks including set up and maintain JIRA projects, boards, workflows, and filters. Track issues, manage backlogs, and ensure proper prioritization of tasks. Train team members on JIRA best practices and ensure consistent use across the team. Generate reports and dashboards to provide visibility into project status and key performance metrics.
  • Develop and maintain project schedules, including sprint timelines and deadlines.
  • Coordinate meetings such as sprint planning, retrospectives, and daily stand-ups and ensure timely follow-ups on action items from meetings.
  • Communicate project status and distribute regular project status reports.
  • Maintain comprehensive documentation, including project plans, meeting notes, status reports, and lessons learned.
  • Continuously evaluate project management processes and suggest improvements.
requirements:
• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
  • Proven experience as a Software Project Coordinator or in a similar role.
  • Strong understanding of software development processes and methodologies.
  • Experience with project management tools (e.g., MS Project, Jira, etc.).
  • Ability to work effectively under pressure and manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Your expertise will leave a lasting legacy on our people and our business.

title: Mechanical Site Engineer
description:
We are looking for Mechanical Site Engineer

 

 Aquarabia for industry and contracting, a leading company in the field of water treatment, is seeking to hire a Mechanical Site Engineer to join its dynamic team to take full ownership of water treatment projects from planning through execution to final handover.


We are looking for a Project Engineer to take full ownership of water treatment projects from planning through execution to final handover.

The role requires independent project leadership, direct coordination with the Client (Owner) and Consultant, and full responsibility for delivering projects in line with approved scope, schedule, quality, and technical requirements.

 

The position follows a hybrid work model, combining office-based planning and coordination with on-site execution and supervision, based on project needs and execution phases.

 

 

 Responsibilities

  • Project Planning & Execution
  • Develop and manage the project execution plan, schedule, and milestones.
  • Lead and execute projects from kick-off to final handover.
  • Coordinate and direct technical office, procurement, and site teams.
  • Control project scope, priorities, and execution strategy.
  • Monitor progress, identify risks and delays, and implement corrective actions.
  • Prepare and issue weekly and monthly progress reports.
  • Client, Consultant & Approvals
  • Act as the primary technical point of contact with the Client (Owner) and Consultant.
  • Lead technical discussions and close all consultant review comments.
  • Coordinate and lead site inspections, tests, and approvals.
  • Ensure all approvals and deliverables are aligned with project schedule and technical requirements.
  • Site, Quality & Handover
  • Ensure execution complies with approved drawings, specifications, and safety standards.
  • Plan and manage testing, commissioning, handover and collection activities.
  • Deliver complete as-built documentation and close all punch list items.
  • Lead project closing and final acceptance with the Client and Consultant.
  • Suggest process and technical design changes to improve performance and efficiency.
  • Cooperate and communicate effectively with project manager and other project participants to provide assistance and technical support.
  • Arranging for material delivery on site with the logistic team.
requirements:

Are you a visionary Tendering Estimation Engineer ready to leave your mark on groundbreaking construction projects? We are searching for an exceptional talent to join our dynamic team in Alexandria, Egypt. This is an unparalleled opportunity for an experienced professional to drive our success by meticulously crafting winning bids and ensuring project viability from the ground up. If you thrive in a challenging, fast-paced environment and possess a keen eye for detail, we want to hear from you!

Overview: As our Tendering Estimation Engineer, you will be a pivotal force in our growth, responsible for the comprehensive preparation and submission of tenders. Your expertise will directly influence our project pipeline and strategic direction. You'll be working on-site, collaborating closely with various departments to deliver robust and competitive proposals.

Responsibilities:

  • Lead the preparation of detailed cost estimates for civil and construction projects, ensuring accuracy and competitiveness.
  • Analyze tender documents, specifications, and drawings to identify project scope and potential risks.
  • Coordinate with procurement and technical teams to gather necessary information for comprehensive bid submissions.
  • Develop and maintain a robust database of material costs, labor rates, and subcontractor pricing.
  • Negotiate with suppliers and subcontractors to secure optimal pricing and terms.
  • Prepare comprehensive technical and commercial proposals, ensuring compliance with client requirements.
  • Participate in pre-bid meetings and site visits to gain a thorough understanding of project conditions.
  • Present tender proposals to management and clients, defending cost estimates and proposed methodologies.

Skills & Technologies: You will leverage your deep understanding of Civil Engineering principles and advanced Estimation techniques. Proficiency in industry-standard software and a strong grasp of Tendering best practices are essential. Your analytical prowess and ability to navigate complex contractual landscapes will be key to your success.

Growth Opportunities: We are committed to your professional development. This role offers significant opportunities to lead major tenders, expand your expertise in diverse construction sectors, and mentor junior engineers. As an integral part of our team, you'll have a clear pathway for advancement into senior leadership roles, shaping the future of our engineering division.

Team & Culture: Join a collaborative and supportive team of dedicated engineers and project professionals. We foster an environment of innovation, mutual respect, and continuous learning. Our culture celebrates achievements and encourages proactive problem-solving, making every day an opportunity to excel.

Impact: Your contributions will be directly visible in the successful acquisition and execution of significant projects across Alexandria and beyond. You will play a crucial role in building our portfolio, enhancing our reputation, and contributing to the development of critical infrastructure. Your work will have a tangible and lasting impact on communities.
requirements:

  • Software Proficiency: Advanced skills in relevant estimation software, AutoCAD, and Microsoft Excel for detailed calculations and presentations.
  • Communication & Negotiation: Superior Communication Skills and a talent for Contract Negotiation, enabling effective interaction with clients, suppliers, and internal teams.
